features: TALC-FREE FORMULA: NUAGE Body Powder is 100% talc-free, formulated with corn starch and sodium bicarbonate to keep skin soft, smooth, and comfortably dry after bathing
DUAL FRAGRANCE PACK: Includes 2 bottles of 250g body powder - one with fresh lavender scent and one with fresh rose scent, offering delightful fragrance options for daily use
ANTI-CHAFING PROTECTION: Absorbs moisture effectively to help prevent chafing and friction, keeping skin comfortable throughout the day for both men and women
BONUS POWDER PUFF INCLUDED: Complete set comes with a soft powder puff applicator for easy and even application of the delicately fragranced powder
GENEROUS SIZE: Each bottle contains 250g of body powder with a 12-month shelf life after opening, designed in the UK and suitable for external use on dry skin
description: Nuage Talc Free Body Powder offers a delightful duo of fragrances to keep you feeling fresh and comfortable throughout the day. This 2-pack bundle features both refreshing Lavender and romantic Rose scents, each in a generous 250g bottle. Formulated to be 100% talc-free, this body powder provides a gentle alternative for those seeking skin-friendly personal care products. The powder effectively absorbs moisture and helps prevent chafing, making it ideal for daily use after bathing or showering. Suitable for both women and men, this versatile body powder leaves skin feeling soft, smooth, and delicately fragranced. The anti-chafing properties make it particularly useful for active lifestyles or warm weather conditions. Each pack includes a convenient powder puff for easy application. Simply dry your skin thoroughly before applying the powder for best results. This bundle offers excellent value with two complementary scents to suit your mood or preference. Keep out of reach of children and for external use only.
